description: Presalytics provides APIs for turning Office/OpenXML documents and analytics content into shareable stories, dashboards, and rendered assets. Its public materials reference microservice APIs for document conversion, OOXML automation, and story creation/publishing.
summary: Presalytics exposes three REST APIs: a public doc-conversion API plus OOXML Automation and Story APIs documented by OpenAPI, with authentication unclear for the latter two from public sources.
